CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-17-2020 Continued To Feb-24-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Andrew C. Mott.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Reporter: Lisa Schafer, CSR #12723. Email: lschafer@sftc.org.

D. Wilson Jordan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Evelyn Sican, Loan Adjuster for plaintiff, was placed under and testified.
Both Mr. Jordan and Ms. Sican appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Andrew C. Mott.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed on February 13, 2020, and personally served on defendant Andrew C. Mott on February 23, 2020.
Default as to defendant Andrew C. Mott was entered on July 2, 2020.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., and against defendant Andrew C. Mott, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $26,617.43. (Amount pled in complaint).
Attorney Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $543.11.

Total - $27,960.54.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
